extract: Ice Fang (Japanese: こおりのキバ Ice Fang) is a damage-dealing Ice-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM67 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM010 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM015 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Fire Fang and Thunder Fang, having similar names and effects.
